[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000111101 5
1 001100101 4
2 000000010 1
3 111011101 7
4 101111110 7
5 100000100 2
6 101011011 6
7 100001100 3

01 10 000000000 a
12 21 101011100 5
23 32 100000100 2 match 5
34 43 100000000 1
45 54 100001000 2
56 65 000001100 2
67 76 000100101 3
70 07 000000000 a

02 20 000000010 1 match 2
13 31 100000100 2 match 5
24 42 101011010 5
35 53 100000100 2 match 5

57 75 000000100 1

71 17 001000101 3

47 74 001000001 2
50 05 000000000 a
61 16 000011101 4
72 27 001100100 3
